title: Israeli launches strikes near ancient heritage castle site in southern Lebanon
description: The strategic castle was held by Israeli troops for 18 years until they withdrew from Lebanon in May 2000.

title: Israeli launches strikes near ancient heritage castle site in southern Lebanon

title: How Ukrainian tradition preserves an ancient bond with ancient Bharat
description: Sending eggshells down rivers and streams four weeks after Easter, Ukrainians once believed they were carrying the message of Christ’s Resurrection to the mythical Rakhmans. Researchers say the tradition has pre-Christian roots, and some associate...

title: A perfect saronic weekend: Exploring Aegina’s ancient highlights
description: A compact archaeological guide to the island where maritime power, myth, and easy island living meet just an hour from Athens.

title: Short Interest in SPDR S&P Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF (NYSEARCA:SPYX) Increases By 609.9%
description: SPDR S&P Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF (NYSEARCA:SPYX – Get Free Report) was the target of a large growth in short interest in May. As of May 15th, there was short interest totaling 75,918 shares, a growth of 609.9% from the April 30th total of 10,694 shares. Based on an average daily volume of 249,518 [...]
